code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Prov as Provider System
    participant Intake as Intake Service
    participant Rules as Rule Engine
    participant RAG as RAG Service
    participant CLF as Predictive Model
    participant Fuse as Fusion
    participant Expl as Explanation Builder
    participant Rev as Reviewer App
    participant Ledger as Decision Ledger

    Prov->>Intake: Submit PA + clinical docs
    Intake->>Rules: Evaluate policy criteria(FinTech_TransactionQueue)
    Intake->>RAG: Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity
    Intake->>CLF: Predict approval probability
    Rules-->>Fuse: rule hits/misses
    RAG-->>Fuse: grounded rationale w/ citations
    CLF-->>Fuse: score + top factors
    Fuse-->Expl: composite decision context
    Expl-->>Rev: Explanation Packet + checklist
    Rev->>Ledger: Store packet (FinTech_LedgerService)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个保险预授权（PA）的端到端流程。核心是从Provider System提交申请开始，经过Intake Service分发，然后并行走三条线：Rule Engine做政策合规判断、RAG Service检索政策片段、还有一个Predictive Model做概率预测。最后这三路结果要汇总到一个Fusion节点，生成统一决策。
明白了。Fusion之后的流向是？我理解为需要生成可解释的决策依据给人工复核，对吗？另外，Predictive Model在图里标注为CLF，这个缩写需要展开吗？
CLF保持缩写即可，团队内部都懂。Fusion之后接Explanation Builder，把规则命中情况、RAG检索到的引用、模型打分和关键因子打包成Explanation Packet，再推给Reviewer App做最终确认。最后Reviewer把完整包写入Decision Ledger，这个ledger要标注对接FinTech_LedgerService。
确认一下：Intake到Rule Engine的那条消息，需要标注FinTech_TransactionQueue作为底层队列对吗？另外RAG返回的是"grounded rationale w/ citations"，CLF返回"score + top factors"，Fusion输出"composite decision context"，这些标注我都记下了。
对的，TransactionQueue那个标注别漏。还有，Provider到Intake的第一步是"Submit PA + clinical docs"，Intake到RAG是"Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity"，Intake到CLF是"Predict approval probability"。这些消息标签帮我核对一下。
发现个问题：Rule Engine、RAG、CLF到Fusion的箭头，你刚才说的是单向推送，但流程上其实是它们各自异步返回结果给Fusion汇总。我改成虚线返回箭头，标注为"rule hits/misses"、"grounded rationale w/ citations"、"score + top factors"，这样更准确。
修复得好，虚线返回确实更清楚。Explanation Builder到Reviewer App也是虚线返回吧，标注"Explanation Packet + checklist"。Reviewer到Ledger是实线，"Store packet (FinTech_LedgerService)"。
全部调整完毕。最终序列：Provider System → Intake Service（提交材料）→ 三路并行评估（Rules/RAG/CLF）→ 虚线返回Fusion → 生成解释包 → Reviewer复核 → 写入Ledger。所有消息标签、FinTech系统标注、虚实线区分都已按你要求落实。
